title: Retail Concierge (Personal Shopper) @ Airport - Up to $2500 p.m.
description:
Do you love shopping? Join us at the World’s Best Airport, where you’ll assist travellers in finding what they need and ensure a rewarding shopping experience!

Job Responsibilities:

  • Manage concierge duties efficiently to elevate the overall guest experience
  • Guide guests with wayfinding throughout the premises
  • Provide personalized shopping recommendations based on guest preferences
  • Share detailed brand and product information
  • Inform passengers about ongoing promotions and special offers
  • Address retail inquiries from passengers promptly and professionally
  • Interact with passengers via face-to-face communication, messages, video, and live chat
  • Ensure a personalized and positive shopping experience for all passengers
  • Maintain exceptional customer service in all interactions
  • Perform other ad-hoc duties as needed to ensure smooth concierge operations

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum GCE “N” Level and above
  • Minimum 1 year of customer service or retail experience
  • Strong team player with the ability to adapt to a fast-paced environment
  • Willingness to work rotating shifts, including weekends, public holidays, and night shifts

Interested applicants, please email to jasmine.tay@persolapac.com or WhatsApp to 98266796

Thank you for your interest but only shortlisted applicants will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to P-Serv Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.p-serv.com.sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
P-Serv is one of Singapore’s most established HR solutions providers. We are the local leader in providing business process outsourcing solutions in projects related to customer service management, collections management and payroll administration. We also provide temporary and contract placements that fits the business needs and requirements of our clients.


Founded in 1990 and acquired by Kelly Services Singapore (Now PERSOLKELLY Singapore) in 2007, we have a proven track record across various different industries and have established long-term partnerships with some of Singapore’s finest local companies and key government agencies.
